bird.name: Rufous-winged sparrow
bird.summary: The rufous-winged sparrow (Peucaea carpalis) is a species of bird in the family Passerellidae, the New World sparrows. It is found in Mexic…

locations.name: 索诺拉沙漠
locations.summary: 索诺拉沙漠（英語：Sonoran Desert；西班牙語：Desierto de Sonora），又稱索诺兰沙漠，是北美洲的一个沙漠，橫跨美国和墨西哥交界，包括美国亞利桑那州、加利福尼亚州和墨西哥索诺拉州大片地区。該沙漠亦因希拉河称作希拉…

relations.subject: Rufous-winged sparrow
relations.evidence: The species is a bird of the Sonoran and Sinaloan deserts though it shuns the driest parts of them. In Arizona it occurs in mesquite grasslands.{{cite book | last =Sibley | first =David Allen | author-link =David Allen Sibley | title =The Sibley Field Guide to Birds of Western North America | publisher =Alfred A
